instagram.caption:
Security tip: Recommended Study Timeline

Plan for approximately 10-16 weeks of dedicated study. Here is a suggested weekly breakdown: Week 1: Processes: Agile planning, Azure Boards, work item tracking, sprints Week 2: Processes: Team collab...

- Week 1: Processes: Agile planning, Azure Boards, work item tracking, sprints
- Week 2: Processes: Team collaboration, wikis, dashboards, stakeholder feedback
- Week 3: Source Control: Git branching strategies, pull requests, code reviews
- Week 4: Source Control: Mono-repo vs multi-repo, Git hooks, Azure Repos
